message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Finnish Travel Habits 1966","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4585","justification":"Survey on leisure travel, tourism behavior, and holiday trips of Finnish residents in the mid‑1960s; directly addresses tourism and leisure in Finland during the 1960s."},{"title":"Leisure Activities and Sports in Finland 1964","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4579","justification":"Study focused on participation in various leisure and sports activities in Finland in 1964; squarely about leisure and sport in the 1960s."},{"title":"Finnish Time Budget Study 1966","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4591","justification":"Time‑use survey that includes time spent on leisure and sports; covers Finland in the 1960s and is relevant to leisure behavior."},{"title":"Youth and Leisure in Finland 1962","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4563","justification":"Examines how Finnish youth spent their leisure time, including sports and recreation, early in the 1960s."},{"title":"Finnish Sports Participation Survey 1968","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4602","justification":"Concentrates on sports participation rates, types of sports, and related leisure patterns in Finland in the late 1960s."},{"title":"Holiday Travel and Tourism in Finland 1969","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4610","justification":"Dedicated tourism study of holiday trips, destinations, and travel motives of Finns at the end of the decade."},{"title":"Cultural and Leisure Consumption in Finland 1965","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4582","justification":"Addresses how Finns used cultural and leisure services (including sports and recreational offerings) in the mid‑1960s."},{"title":"Recreation and Outdoor Activities in Finland 1963","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4572","justification":"Focuses on outdoor recreation (hiking, skiing, camping, etc.) and leisure behavior of the Finnish population in the early 1960s."},{"title":"Social Change and Leisure in Finland 1967","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4597","justification":"Broader social change survey with a substantial module on leisure time, sports, and tourism practices in Finland in 1967."},{"title":"Sports Clubs and Voluntary Associations in Finland 1960","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4551","justification":"Study of membership and participation in sports clubs and related leisure associations in Finland at the start of the 1960s; relevant to organized sport and leisure."}]}
